REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1267 Goettingen Street, Sf Ca 94134)
Off Calendar Sep-08-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were heard: PES-13-296886 The Estate of John Joseph Carroll and PES-13-297363 The Estate of Catherine Carroll Callejo.

Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for Public Administrator.

The Court noted that the Department of Health Services requested special notice in the Estate of John Joseph Carroll but that it does not preclude going forward with the sale. Each Estate owns a 50% interest in the property. The sale is for 100% of the property. The sale was confirmed at $557,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed July 1, 2014. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-01-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Giulio Accornero for Annette Carroll, Jean Casrroll and the three Children of George Carroll. Jonathan Ferdon for Public Administrator.

Mr. Accornero stated that Mr. Fink was not present because his Clients refused to pay for additional appearances, that the entitlement issue still needs to be resolved and that he has a stipulation to appoint the Public Administrator and that all of the Heirs that have been located have consented. Mr. Ferdon stated that the Public Administrator wants to be appointed under Probate Code 7620(c), and that the Public Administrator agrees and consents to the appointment. The Court directed Mr. Accornero to file the stipulation and provide an endorsed copy, and directed Mr. Ferdon to submit a proposed order. The Petition for Letters of Administration was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)
